candidate.completion: ghost me in person so I can finally get the full experience.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please ghost me in person so I can finally get the full experience.

evaluation.rationale: The paradox in "ghost me in person" gives the line a real turn, and the social logic is legible. It loses force through a somewhat extended landing, so the wit reads as clever and recognizable rather than sharp or fully quotable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
